MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT HILTON HOTEL EMPLOYER, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration Of Plaintiff'S Claims.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Hilton Hotel's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted.

Order signed. (See signed order/word minutes for complete ruling.)
